selection_policy: Built-in offline HIPB solution cache for common VisionBert FP8 PTPC swizzleA M-buckets. Candidates are included only when robust confirmation shows correctness on GPU0/2/3/4, every GPU median is at least 3% faster than solution_index=-1, cross-GPU median std is <=5%, and per-GPU round-median std is <=5%. Shapes without a stable >=3% gain intentionally fall back to -1.

solutions.note: Selected by robust offline retune: correct on GPU0/2/3/4, every GPU median is >=3% faster than solution_index=-1, cross-GPU median std <=5%, and per-GPU round-median std <=5%. The same row was also accepted by the 7-GPU top5 robust validation except qkv M=4096, which had one short-run outlier and passed the longer confirmation run.
